name: Grid Run
description: Synchronously executes any operation reachable on the lattice and returns its result. The 'operation' argument accepts any resolvable form: catalog paths (v/ops/json/merge, v/test/ops/echo), your own pins (o/my-op), bare hex hashes, /a/<hash>, or DID URLs (for remote venues). Pass the operation's input arguments as a JSON map matching its declared input schema (use covia_read path=v/ops/<adapter>/<op> to see the schema first if uncertain). Blocks until the job finishes — for long-running pipelines use grid_invoke instead and poll grid_jobStatus / grid_jobResult. To run on a remote venue, pass venue=<url-or-did>.

operation.description: Operation reference. Any resolvable form: v/ops/<adapter>/<op>, o/<name>, hex hash, /a/<hash>, or DID URL. Use covia_list path=v/ops to discover what's available.

input.description: Arguments matching the operation's input schema. Use covia_read path=v/ops/<adapter>/<op> to inspect the schema if unsure.

venue.description: Optional remote venue URL or DID. Omit to run on this venue.

output.description: The operation's output (shape determined by the operation's output schema)
